summary.text: The question is: "Search X for what people are saying in the last 3 days about developers building unprompted SDKs, tutorials, or case studies for a dev tool/protocol as a signal of real product-marke...

output.input: {"query":"developers building unprompted SDKs tutorials case studies for dev tool protocol as signal of real product-market fit vs paid marketing AI-judged bounty protocols agent payment protocols on Base","limit":"10","from_date":"2026-07-16","min_score_threshold":"0.1"}
output.name: x_semantic_search

output.input: {"query":"(sdk OR tutorial OR \"case study\" OR \"product market fit\" OR pmf) (unprompted OR organic OR \"built for\" OR bounty OR \"agent payment\") (protocol OR base) since:2026-07-16","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

content.text:
**Here are the 5 most notable recent tweets** (last 3 days, ~July 16–19, 2026) matching your query on organic developer signals of real PMF (unprompted SDKs/tutorials/case studies) vs. paid marketing, plus related topics like AI-judged bounties/agent payments on Base:[[1]](https://x.com/PeerReview/status/2078532214686462029)

- **@PeerReview** (Jul 18): "the agent APIs that get adopted all do the same three boring things. a free key, no sales call. one command that runs on the first try. errors that say what to fix, not 'something went wrong.' that's the whole moat. nobody schedules a demo to try your SDK." — Directly frames easy, unprompted SDK adoption as the real PMF signal.[[1]](https://x.com/PeerReview/status/2078532214686462029)

- **@maloymediika** (Jul 17): Highlighted an open-source dev dropping a full "LOOP ENGINEERING" framework for trading agents (4.8k stars, zero dollars). Includes loop-audit CLI, 5-min getting started, and scoring system. "Stop prompting. Design the loop. Score it." — Classic unprompted tutorial/framework build as organic PMF evidence.[[2]](https://x.com/maloymediika/status/2078128309498450081)

- **@hetu_protocol** (Jul 19): "agent tool markets are becoming real infrastructure... an agent can find a tool, pass context, receive a result, retry on failure... without a causal record, reputation becomes a review score detached from evidence. setu records tool calls as work receipts..." — Discusses agent payment/settlement protocols and infrastructure needs.[[3]](https://x.com/hetu_protocol/status/2078914020401369101)

- **@coco__and__co** (Jul 17): "This is like no-code build for base! A developer can now let a user sign in with email, create a smart account, sponsor the first transaction with a paymaster, batch approve USDC + place a prediction into -> **one** UserOperation, and settle everything on Base." — Example of builders shipping practical Base agent/payment tooling organically.[[4]](https://x.com/coco__and__co/status/2078217891338752056)

- **@NickPlaysCrypto** (Jul 16): Noted Base's success came from "organic rise of base projects that had natural PMF (virtuals)" rather than forced narratives, contrasting with centralized pushes. Ties directly into organic PMF signals on Base.[[5]](https://x.com/NickPlaysCrypto/status/2077602420473974844)

These posts stand out for relevance, engagement signals, and alignment with unprompted/organic developer activity as a PMF indicator (especially around agents, SDK friction, and Base protocols). No strong hits on "AI-judged bounties" in this window, but the agent payment/tooling discussions are closely adjacent.
